90 ExpressionBuilderR7vR1Core::
91 setVariable(Arcane::Integer index, const Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real> & variable)
92 {
93  String name = m_function_parser->getVariable(index);
94  m_function_parser->setVariable(name, variable.unguardedBasePointer(), variable.size());

159 void
160 ExpressionBuilderR7vR1Core::
161 eval(const Arcane::Real& var0,
162  const Arcane::Real& var1,
163  const Arcane::Real& var2,
164  const Arcane::Real& var3,
165  const Arcane::Real& var4,
166  const Arcane::Real& var5,
167  const Arcane::Real& var6,
168  Arcane::Real& res0)
169 
170 {
171  const std::string var0_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(0);
172  m_function_parser->setVariable(var0_name, & var0, 1);
173  const std::string var1_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(1);
174  m_function_parser->setVariable(var1_name, & var1, 1);
175  const std::string var2_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(2);
176  m_function_parser->setVariable(var2_name, & var2, 1);
177  const std::string var3_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(3);
178  m_function_parser->setVariable(var3_name, & var3, 1);
179  const std::string var4_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(4);
180  m_function_parser->setVariable(var4_name, & var4, 1);
181  const std::string var5_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(5);
182  m_function_parser->setVariable(var5_name, & var5, 1);
183  const std::string var6_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(6);
184  m_function_parser->setVariable(var6_name, & var6, 1);
185 
186  m_function_parser->setEvaluationResult(& res0, 1);
187 
188  m_function_parser->eval();
189  m_function_parser->cleanup();
190 }
191 
192 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
193 
194 void
195 ExpressionBuilderR7vR1Core::
196 eval(const Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real>& var0,
197  const Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real>& var1,
198  const Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real>& var2,
199  const Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real>& var3,
200  const Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real>& var4,
201  const Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real>& var5,
202  const Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real>& var6,
203  Arcane::Array<Arcane::Real>& res0)
204 {
205  const std::string var0_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(0);
206  m_function_parser->setVariable(var0_name, var0.unguardedBasePointer(), var0.size());
207  const std::string var1_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(1);
208  m_function_parser->setVariable(var1_name, var1.unguardedBasePointer(), var1.size());
209  const std::string var2_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(2);
210  m_function_parser->setVariable(var2_name, var2.unguardedBasePointer(), var2.size());
211  const std::string var3_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(3);
212  m_function_parser->setVariable(var3_name, var3.unguardedBasePointer(), var3.size());
213  const std::string var4_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(4);
214  m_function_parser->setVariable(var4_name, var4.unguardedBasePointer(), var4.size());
215  const std::string var5_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(5);
216  m_function_parser->setVariable(var5_name, var5.unguardedBasePointer(), var5.size());
217  const std::string var6_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(6);
218  m_function_parser->setVariable(var6_name, var6.unguardedBasePointer(), var6.size());
219 
220  m_function_parser->setEvaluationResult(res0.unguardedBasePointer(), res0.size());
221 
222  m_function_parser->eval();
223  m_function_parser->cleanup();
224 }

228 void
229 ExpressionBuilderR7vR1Core::
230 eval(Arcane::RealConstArrayView var0,
231  Arcane::RealConstArrayView var1,
232  Arcane::RealConstArrayView var2,
233  Arcane::RealConstArrayView var3,
234  Arcane::RealConstArrayView var4,
235  Arcane::RealConstArrayView var5,
236  Arcane::RealConstArrayView var6,
237  Arcane::RealArrayView res0)
238 {
239  const std::string var0_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(0);
240  m_function_parser->setVariable(var0_name, var0.unguardedBasePointer(), var0.size());
241  const std::string var1_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(1);
242  m_function_parser->setVariable(var1_name, var1.unguardedBasePointer(), var1.size());
243  const std::string var2_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(2);
244  m_function_parser->setVariable(var2_name, var2.unguardedBasePointer(), var2.size());
245  const std::string var3_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(3);
246  m_function_parser->setVariable(var3_name, var3.unguardedBasePointer(), var3.size());
247  const std::string var4_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(4);
248  m_function_parser->setVariable(var4_name, var4.unguardedBasePointer(), var4.size());
249  const std::string var5_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(5);
250  m_function_parser->setVariable(var5_name, var5.unguardedBasePointer(), var5.size());
251  const std::string var6_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(6);
252  m_function_parser->setVariable(var6_name, var6.unguardedBasePointer(), var6.size());
253 
254  m_function_parser->setEvaluationResult(res0.unguardedBasePointer(), res0.size());
255 
256  m_function_parser->eval();
257  m_function_parser->cleanup();
258 }

260 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
261 
262 Arcane::Real
263 ExpressionBuilderR7vR1Core::
264 eval(const Arcane::Real& var0,
265  const Arcane::Real& var1,
266  const Arcane::Real& var2,
267  const Arcane::Real& var3,
268  const Arcane::Real& var4,
269  const Arcane::Real& var5,
270  const Arcane::Real& var6)
271 {
272  const std::string var0_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(0);
273  m_function_parser->setVariable(var0_name, & var0, 1);
274  const std::string var1_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(1);
275  m_function_parser->setVariable(var1_name, & var1, 1);
276  const std::string var2_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(2);
277  m_function_parser->setVariable(var2_name, & var2, 1);
278  const std::string var3_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(3);
279  m_function_parser->setVariable(var3_name, & var3, 1);
280  const std::string var4_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(4);
281  m_function_parser->setVariable(var4_name, & var4, 1);
282  const std::string var5_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(5);
283  m_function_parser->setVariable(var5_name, & var5, 1);
284  const std::string var6_name = m_function_parser->getVariable(6);
285  m_function_parser->setVariable(var6_name, & var6, 1);
286 
287  Arcane::Real res0;
288  m_function_parser->setEvaluationResult(& res0, 1);
289 
290  m_function_parser->eval();
291  m_function_parser->cleanup();
292 
293  return res0 ;
294 }
